detailed_description.heading: High-Speed LTE7
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik wAP ax LTE7 kit is a high-performance, weatherproof Wi-Fi 6 access point with a built-in CAT7 LTE modem, designed to deliver reliable connectivity even in challenging environments. Whether you need internet access at a remote countryside home, a rural gas station, a public bus stop, or a small outdoor business area, this compact device ensures fast and stable coverage across your property. Its dual-band, dual-chain (2x2 MIMO) radio provides simultaneous 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz connections, with antenna gains of 6 dBi and 7 dBi, optimizing both range and signal quality. The updated CAT7 LTE modem doubles upload speeds compared to previous generations, supporting up to 100 Mbps upload and 300 Mbps download, depending on network conditions. The modem also supports carrier aggregation (2×CA) for higher efficiency and responsiveness in congested areas, as well as extended LTE frequency coverage, including Band 28 (700 MHz) and Band 32 (1500 MHz). With support for a broad range of LTE FDD bands (1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 20, 28, 32) and TDD bands (38, 40, 41), along with fallback to 3G (R8), this device ensures continuous connectivity for multiple devices, from laptops and smartphones to IoT and smart home sensors. The combination of high-gain antennas and advanced LTE technology guarantees stronger signal reception and more stable performance, even in rural or high-density areas. Its sleek, compact design allows unobtrusive placement on walls or rooftops, while the concealed anti-vandal screw enhances security. By integrating high-speed LTE7 with Wi-Fi 6, the wAP ax LTE7 kit provides a complete, reliable solution for uninterrupted connectivity in both private and public environments, ensuring users can enjoy fast internet anywhere coverage is limited or conventional broadband is unavailable.

detailed_description.heading: Stable Performance
detailed_description.text: The wAP ax LTE7 kit combines advanced hardware with flexible network management tools to provide exceptional Wi-Fi performance and reliable LTE backup. At its core is a dual-core ARM IPQ-5010 CPU running at 800 MHz, supported by 256 MB of DDR3L RAM and 128 MB NAND storage, ensuring smooth operation under heavy network loads, including simultaneous Wi-Fi 6 connections, VPN traffic, and network management tasks. This hardware upgrade allows the device to maintain high throughput without slowing down, even when multiple clients are connected. The device runs RouterOS v7, License level 4, offering advanced features such as CAPsMAN, which enables centralized management of multiple MikroTik access points. CAPsMAN allows administrators to configure, monitor, and control multiple units with just a few clicks, simplifying network maintenance for businesses, campuses, or large properties. The wAP ax LTE7 kit features two Gigabit Ethernet ports, including one with PoE-in support, and an additional DC jack input ranging from 12–57 V, allowing flexible powering options for diverse installation environments. Whether powered via PoE or standard DC, the device ensures uninterrupted connectivity even in remote areas. The compact 229 x 113 x 43 mm weatherproof enclosure is designed for wall or roof mounting, with a discreet cable pass-through for hidden wiring. This combination of modern ARM architecture, high-speed LTE7 connectivity, and Wi-Fi 6 technology guarantees excellent network performance, making it ideal for small businesses, rural homes, or outdoor public spaces where speed, stability, and centralized management are essential.

detailed_description.heading: Weatherproof & Vandalproof
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik wAP ax LTE7 kit is built to withstand harsh environmental conditions while maintaining reliable internet performance. Its IP66-rated weatherproof enclosure provides full protection against dust, rain, and strong winds, ensuring uninterrupted operation in outdoor spaces. The anti-vandal screw design adds a layer of security, preventing unauthorized access or tampering. This makes it suitable for installation in public areas, busy streets, or remote locations where security and durability are critical. The access point’s elegant, low-profile design allows it to blend into any environment without attracting attention, making it a discreet solution for private properties or commercial installations. Installation is straightforward: the device can be mounted on walls or rooftops from the inside of the case, and a dedicated rear indentation marks the drill point for safe and hidden cable routing. The combination of dual-band Wi-Fi 6, high-gain LTE antennas, and flexible power options (PoE-in 18–57 V, DC jack 12–57 V, max 13 W) ensures consistent coverage and reliable internet performance across large yards, multiple rooms, or public areas. With support for advanced LTE features, carrier aggregation, and broad frequency bands, the wAP ax LTE7 kit provides uninterrupted connectivity even in congested or remote networks. Whether serving as a primary router, LTE backup, or outdoor access point, this compact yet rugged device guarantees stable internet for residential, business, or public deployments. Its durable construction, versatile mounting options, and high-performance LTE and Wi-Fi 6 technology make it an ideal choice for anyone seeking a reliable, long-lasting network solution in any environment.
